x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Amount Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are earned as a predefined fixed value per transaction or activity.

Comment:
Example: Earn 10 points per transaction regardless of amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage-Based Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are a percentage of a base value, like transaction amount.

Comment:
Example: Earn 1% cashback on all purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Reward rates vary across tiers or ranges of activity or spending.

Comment:
Example: 1% cashback up to $1,000 spend, 2% above $1,000.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Volumne-Based Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards depend on total accumulated activity over a period, not individual transactions.

Comment:
Example: Earn 500 bonus points after spending $5,000 in a month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Frequency-Based Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are earned based on number of qualifying transactions.

Comment:
Example: Earn 5 points for every 3 transactions completed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold-Based Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are given when specific thresholds or milestones are reached.

Comment:
Example: Bonus points after 10 transactions or $1,000 spend.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bonus Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Extra rewards are earned using multipliers or bonus rates.

Comment:
Example: Double points on dining transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Periodic Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are earned based on time period or holding period.

Comment:
Example: Points earned monthly based on average account balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Dynamic Calculation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rewards are calculated using a custom formula with multiple variables.

Comment:
Example: Points = (Transaction Amount × Rate) + Bonus − Adjustments.
